createDAGv3.signature: createDAGv3(nodes: Array<{id: string, group?: string, priority?: number, description?: string}>, edges: Array<{from: string, to: string}>, options?: {groups?: Record<string, {sets: string[], description?: string}>}): DAGv3
createDAGv3.description: Creates a v3 DAG with optional group annotations on nodes and a top-level groups summary

validateDAGv3.signature: validateDAGv3(dag: object): { valid: boolean, errors: string[] }
validateDAGv3.description: Validates a v3 DAG structure including group field consistency and groups summary completeness

syncDAGStatus.description: Reads set statuses from STATE.json and updates DAG node status fields to match

partitionIntoGroups.signature: partitionIntoGroups(dag: DAGv3, contracts: Array<Contract>, numDevelopers: number): { groups: Array<{id: string, sets: string[], sharedDeps: string[]}>, crossGroupEdges: Array<{from: string, to: string, sharedFiles: string[]}> }
partitionIntoGroups.description: Partitions sets into N developer groups minimizing cross-group file ownership conflicts

annotateDAGWithGroups.signature: annotateDAGWithGroups(dag: DAGv3, groups: Array<{id: string, sets: string[]}>): DAGv3
annotateDAGWithGroups.description: Returns a modified DAG with group field set on each node according to the provided group assignments

generateGroupReport.signature: generateGroupReport(groups: Array<{id: string, sets: string[], sharedDeps: string[]}>, crossGroupEdges: Array): string
generateGroupReport.description: Returns a markdown summary of group assignments and cross-group dependencies

dagGroupsCLI.description: CLI subcommand that displays current developer group assignments from DAG.json

dagRegroupCLI.description: CLI subcommand that re-partitions sets into N groups

migrateDAGv1toV2.description: Auto-migrates a v1 DAG to v2 format, preserving all existing data

migrateDAGv2toV3.description: Auto-migrates a v2 DAG to v3 format, adding group fields with null defaults

preservedRecalculateDAG.description: Needs the fixed recalculateDAG that preserves annotations so DAGv3 group annotations survive add-set operations

fileOwnershipSchema.description: Needs fileOwnership in contract schema so the group partitioning algorithm can read file ownership data from contracts

backwardCompatibility.description: All existing DAG consumers (getExecutionOrder, getMergeOrder, dag show) must continue working with v3 DAGs without modification -- group fields are optional

autoMigration.description: tryLoadDAG() must auto-detect DAG version (v1/v2/v3) and migrate to v3 transparently, preserving all existing data

groupPartitioningDeterminism.description: partitionIntoGroups() must produce deterministic output for the same input

crossGroupMinimization.description: The partitioning algorithm must minimize cross-group file ownership conflicts

definition.scope: Extend DAG to v3 with group annotations, implement developer group partitioning algorithm, add DAG status synchronization, create migration logic for v1/v2 DAGs, add dag groups and dag regroup CLI commands, and integrate group assignment into the roadmapper.

tasks.description: Create DAGv3 schema with optional group, priority, description fields on nodes and top-level groups summary
tasks.acceptance: createDAGv3() produces valid v3 DAGs; validateDAGv3() rejects invalid structures

tasks.description: Implement auto-migration: migrateDAGv1toV2() and migrateDAGv2toV3() with tryLoadDAG() auto-detection
tasks.acceptance: v1 and v2 DAGs are transparently migrated to v3 on load; all existing data preserved

tasks.description: Implement syncDAGStatus() that synchronizes DAG node statuses from STATE.json
tasks.acceptance: DAG node statuses match STATE.json set statuses after calling syncDAGStatus()

tasks.description: Create group.cjs with partitionIntoGroups(), annotateDAGWithGroups(), generateGroupReport()
tasks.acceptance: partitionIntoGroups() produces balanced groups minimizing cross-group file conflicts; output is deterministic

tasks.description: Add dag groups and dag regroup CLI subcommands
tasks.acceptance: dag groups displays current assignments; dag regroup --team-size N re-partitions and updates DAG.json

tasks.description: Extend dag show with group labels and cross-group edge highlighting
tasks.acceptance: dag show displays group annotations on each node

tasks.description: Integrate group assignment into roadmapper role module output
tasks.acceptance: Roadmapper output includes group annotations when team-size > 1

acceptance: All existing DAG consumers work unchanged with v3 DAGs
Group partitioning algorithm produces balanced groups
v1 and v2 DAGs auto-migrate to v3
dag groups and dag regroup commands functional
